final_prompt.prompt:
Create an editorial photograph of a muscular athlete performing a deadlift in a professional gym setting.

Style/medium: needs an industrial aesthetic — exact stylistic execution is yours
Composition: must include the athlete as the focal subject performing a deadlift
Subject: must include a muscular athlete with defined muscle lines performing a deadlift
Scene/backdrop: must include a professional gym with industrial-style interior design
Lighting/mood: needs a cool-toned, masculine atmosphere — exact light source mix is yours
Color palette: needs a cool-toned direction — exact hex values and ratios are yours
Materials/textures: must include sweat and power aesthetics — exact texture treatment is yours
Text (verbatim): 
Constraints: 
Avoid:
